'''Rimsen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] officer in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he held the rank of [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and commanded the ''[[Corusca Fire]]''. A native of [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]], he took his ship off his assigned course back home when he became suspicious after his planned course was altered to take him away from [[Vector Prime]]. Arriving at Agamar, he learned from his family of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] visit there to recruit support for the war against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Rimsen ordered the ''Corusca Fire'' to rendezvous with the ''[[Ralroost]]'' and participated in [[Traest Kre'fey]]'s relief of the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]].
